prompt:
You are a document understanding assistant.

Analyze the attached image carefully. The image may contain:
- multiple text columns
- one or more structured tables
- handwritten notes that may be messy, slanted, or misspelled

Your tasks:
1. Extract every table as valid JSON.
2. Extract multi-column printed text while preserving column separation.
3. Extract handwritten text into raw and corrected fields.
4. Return only valid JSON with keys table, columns, handwritten.

columns.title: THE GREEN PLANET INITIATIVE Building a Sustainable Tomorrow
columns.Our Mission: The Green Planet Initiative is a non-profit organization dedicated to creating a sustainable future through education, community engagement, and innovative solutions. We believe that small actions can lead to big changes.
columns.GET INVOLVED: Join us in making a difference! Visit our website or contact us to volunteer.

columns.title: A GREENER FUTURE STARTS TODAY
content: Climate change is one of the biggest challenges of our time. Rising temperatures, plastic pollution, and deforestation threaten our planet and future generations.
Together, we can create a cleaner, greener, and healthier world. Every action counts!

columns.title: VOLUNTEER STORIES
quotes: "Being part of the tree plantation drive was an amazing experience. It felt great to contribute to the environment." – Neha, Volunteer
"I learned so much about recycling and sustainable living. These workshops changed the way I think." – Arjun, Workshop Participant

handwritten.raw: Need more volunteers for the weekend drive. Ask Aman and Priya to share in their groups.
handwritten.corrected: Need more volunteers for the weekend drive. Ask Aman and Priya to share in their groups.
